summary: Iteration 65: PDF Blob URL Fix for CL Preview + Email Text Editing Feature. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: CL PDF preview uses blob URL correctly (fix working), EmailPreviewDialog shows 'Modifica testo' toggle for edit mode with editable subject/body fields.

backend_api_tests.GET /api/invoices/{invoice_id}/preview-e: PASS - Returns required fields (to_email, to_name, subject, html_body, has_attachment, attachment_name)

frontend_ui_tests.cl_pdf_preview_blob_url: PASS - PDF preview iframe src is blob URL (not appending ?token= to blob URLs)
frontend_ui_tests.email_preview_body_field: PASS - Shows HTML body in iframe with data-testid='email-preview-body'
frontend_ui_tests.email_toggle_edit_button: PASS - Found 'Modifica testo' toggle button with data-testid='email-toggle-edit'
frontend_ui_tests.email_edit_mode_subject: PASS - In edit mode, subject becomes editable Input with data-testid='email-edit-subject'
frontend_ui_tests.email_edit_mode_body: PASS - In edit mode, body becomes editable Textarea with data-testid='email-edit-body'
frontend_ui_tests.email_send_button: PASS - Found send button with data-testid='email-preview-send-btn'
frontend_ui_tests.toggle_back_to_preview: PASS - Clicking toggle returns to preview mode

critical_code_review_comments: PDF blob URL fix correctly implemented in CommessaOpsPanel.js line 1772: src={pdfPreviewUrl.startsWith('blob:') ? pdfPreviewUrl : ...}
EmailPreviewDialog correctly implements editMode state toggle between preview and edit modes
All 6 send-email endpoints (CL, RdP, OdA, Invoice, DDT, Preventivo) accept optional custom_subject/custom_body in POST body
handlePreviewClPdf fetches PDF as blob and creates blob URL via URL.createObjectURL()
Edit mode fields use proper data-testid attributes: email-edit-subject, email-edit-body
test_credentials: Created and cleaned up test sessions (test_session_1772347xxx)
seed_data_creation: Created test commessa with CL entry, fornitore/cliente, invoice, DDT, preventivo - all cleaned up after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF blob URL fix verified - handlePreviewClPdf creates blob URL which is used directly in iframe src without appending ?token=. EmailPreviewDialog has editMode state with toggle button (data-testid='email-toggle-edit'). In edit mode, shows editable Input for subject (data-testid='email-edit-subject') and Textarea for body (data-testid='email-edit-body'). When sending in edit mode, POST body includes {custom_subject, custom_body}; in preview mode, POST body is empty {}. All 6 email endpoints (CL, RdP, OdA, Invoice, DDT, Preventivo) support custom text.
